title: Nicrok #5268
definition:
Nisroch = "the great eagle"

 1) an idol of Nineveh worshipped by Sennacherib; symbolised by the
    eagle-headed human figure
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nisroch = "the great eagle"

 1) an idol of Nineveh worshipped by Sennacherib; symbolised by the
    eagle-headed human figure

    NASB:  an Assyr. god
